muniCodeNote: amlegal WAF blocks direct WebFetch (HTTP 403). Use search snippets or city FAQ pages as fallback.
fireAgencyNote: BHFD is independent municipal fire dept — NOT LAFD. Fire plan check submitted through Building & Safety (ProjectDox); BHFD coordinates internally. ~3 week turnaround.
wuiNote: Northern hillside areas (north of Sunset Blvd, Trousdale Estates) in VHFHSZ. Flatland portions not in VHFHSZ. State updated FHSZ boundaries April 2025 — verify current map at CalFire FHSZ viewer.
architecturalCommissionNote: Required for exterior design review before building permit issuance. Trousdale Estates has stricter standards.
localCodeAmendments: §9-1-202: Rooftop equipment must be enclosed/screened with finishes matching building exterior
§9-1-202: All wood roof coverings must be Class A fire-retardant or treated with fire-retardant spray (citywide, not just VHFHSZ)
needsHumanReview: ADU local cap (650 sq ft) may conflict with state 850 sq ft minimum — verify compliance
April 2025 FHSZ boundary update — verify exact new boundaries at CalFire FHSZ viewer
